title: Boastful Loki
content:
{{Otheruses|Loki}} {{CharHub|Boastful Loki|Loki}} {{AltUniverse|the "[[Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki Universe]]"|3=Characters|4=1}} {{Character |image = Boastful Loki Official.jpg |real name = Loki {{ConjecNameAU|Laufeyson}}{{Ref|LK104}}This character's surname is derived from a Variant from ''[[Thor: The Dark World Prelude|Thor: The Dark World Prelude, Issue #2]]'' and thus is conjecturally treated as the same. |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Boastful Loki{{Ref|LK104C}}}} |species = [[Frost Giant]] |gender = Fluid[[:File:Loki Promo File.jpeg|Loki's TVA File]] |citizenship = [[Jotunheim|Jotun]] (formerly)
{{Citizenship|ASG2}} (formerly) |title = Prince of Asgard (formerly) |affiliation = [[Kid Loki's Crew]] (formerly) |tv series = ''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]''
*''[[The Nexus Event]]''
*''[[Journey Into Mystery]]'' |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[Variants]]'' |actor = [[DeObia Oparei]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|So, after I vanquished [[Steve Rogers/Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki|Captain America]] and [[Iron Man/Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki|Iron Man]], I claimed my prize. All six [[Infinity Stones]].|Boastful Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} '''Loki {{ConjecNameAU|Laufeyson}}''' is a Variant of [[Loki]] who self-purportedly was able to assemble all six [[Infinity Stones]], before being pruned by the [[Time Variance Authority]] and banished to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. He was able to remain undetected from [[Alioth]] by travelling with the [[Classic Loki|Classic]], [[Kid Loki|Kid]] and [[Alligator Loki|Alligator]] Variants of himself. Boastful Loki intended to betray them for a separate group led by [[President Loki]], but was double-crossed himself and ultimately was left behind in the ensuing fight, while the other Variants escaped. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== Boastful Loki caused a nexus event within the established [[Sacred Timeline]]. His actions made him a target of the [[Time Variance Authority]] which arrived and pruned him along with his reality. He ended up in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] where he came across other [[Loki]] Variants, [[Classic Loki]], [[Kid Loki]], and [[Alligator Loki]] and started living with them in the [[Loki Palace]], hiding from the [[Alioth]]. Boastful Loki claimed that in his reality he successfully defeated [[Steve Rogers/Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki|Captain America]] and [[Iron Man/Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki|Iron Man]] and even obtained all six [[Infinity Stones]] which was his nexus event; however, none of his allies ever believed him. While living at the palace with Kid Loki as their king, Boastful Loki secretly made a deal with [[President Loki]], promising to betray his allies in exchange for a rulership.{{Ref|LK105}} ===Meeting Alternate Self=== [[File:The Tree Amigos.png|{{AltFloat}}|Boastful Loki and other Lokis meet a [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki Variant]]]] {{Quote|So, why did you want to return to the [[TVA]] so badly, anyway?"
"You leave your glorious purpose there?"
"Something like that.|[[Classic Loki]], Boastful Loki and [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]|Journey Into Mystery}} Together with [[Kid Loki]], [[Classic Loki]], and [[Alligator Loki]], Boastful Loki encountered another [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki Variant]] who had been pruned by the [[TVA]] and sent to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]].{{Ref|LK104}} Their presence was noticed by [[Alioth]], so Lokis rushed to get to the safety as soon as possible. Loki, however, was trying to get answers what was going on, alarming Alioth, so Kid Loki had to intervene before explaining their situation. Boastful Loki described Alioth as a living tempest which devours breached timelines sent to the Void by the TVA. [[File:Vfd1800 105 comp v002.1069.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Boastful Loki describes [[Alioth]]]] Loki tried to suggest creating a new nexus event and lure the TVA to steal [[TemPad]] and escape; however, Boastful Loki noted that it was pointless, since they cannot interfere the timeline from the Void. After taking cover at the [[Loki Palace]], Classic Loki asked Loki why he was desperate to return to the TVA. Boastful Loki asked if he left his "glorious purpose" there, and Loki replied that it was close to that. They then sat around a fire, telling stories about their nexus events, with Alligator Loki quickly claiming Boastful Loki's story a lie. Boastful Loki mocked Alligator Loki for his nexus event being eating a neighbor's [[cat]], which made the latter to bite Boastful Loki, so Classic and Loki had to stop Boastful from snapping his neck. Without any chance to escape from the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], Loki suggested trying to kill [[Alioth]] instead of hiding from it, but other Lokis only laughed at him.{{Ref|LK105}} ===Betrayal=== [[File:Loki Stills 47.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Boastful Loki fights against other Loki Variants]] {{Quote|Apologies, my liege. I betrayed you, and now, I'm king.|Boastful Loki to [[Kid Loki]]|Journey Into Mystery}} Just as when [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] was about to leave, the [[Loki Palace]] was invaded by [[President Loki]] and his army who found the hideout due to Boastful Loki giving him a location. According to their deal, Boastful Loki betrayed [[Kid Loki]] and claimed to be a new king, only to be betrayed by President Loki who was, in turn, betrayed by his own army. Eventually, all Lokis started fighting at the palace, with Boastful Loki attacking some of them, while Loki, Kid Loki, [[Classic Loki]], and [[Alligator Loki]] escaped.{{Ref|LK105}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Frost Giant Physiology''': Boastful Loki is a [[Frost Giant]], which naturally gifted him with powers that all people of his species possess such as strength, durability, agility, stamina, and longevity. **'''Superhuman Strength''': Like all Frost Giants, Boastful Loki possesses great superhuman strength. He was notably able to comfortably contend with several other versions of himself in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. He claimed to beat [[Steve Rogers/Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki|Captain America]] and [[Iron Man/Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki|Iron Man]] as well, but none of his allies believed him. **'''Superhuman Durability''': Boastful Loki's body is more resistant to physical damage and shrugged off many attacks during the [[Ambush at the Loki Palace]]. **'''Superhuman Agility''': Boastful Loki naturally possesses incredible agility and used it to fight two Loki Variants at once in [[Loki Palace]]. **'''Superhuman Stamina''': Boastful Loki battled the [[Loki Bandits]] for prolonged periods of time and enjoyed it all without breaking a sweat. ===Abilities=== *'''Expert Combatant''': [[File:Loki Stills 47.jpg|thumb|250px|Boastful Loki fighting against his Variants]] Boastful Loki was able to fight against several Loki Variants at once after being betrayed by them and enjoyed the entire fight, never once being worried. He also claimed to have beaten [[Steve Rogers/Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki|Captain America]] and [[Iron Man/Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki|Iron Man]]. *'''Hammer Mastery''': Boastful Loki used a hammer in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] and fought many Lokis at once with it. *'''Tactician''': Boastful Loki devised a plan to betray [[Kid Loki]], [[Classic Loki]], and [[Alligator Loki]] by helping the [[Loki Bandits]] find [[Loki Palace]]. However, Boastful Loki was betrayed himself. *'''Bilingualism''': Boastful Loki is fluent in his native Asgardian, as well as English. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''Hammer''': Boastful Loki wielded a hammer while fighting other Loki Variants. ==Facilities== {{Quote|That was not the bargain! I gave you our location. In exchange for shelter and supplies, you give me your army and I take the throne.|Boastful Loki to [[President Loki]]|Journey Into Mystery}} *'''[[Loki Palace]]''': Boastful Loki lived in the Loki Palace while in league with [[Kid Loki's Crew]] until he betrayed them to the [[Loki Bandits]]. ==Relationships== ===Enemies=== *[[Steve Rogers/Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki|Steve Rogers/Captain America]] † - Victim *[[Iron Man/Infinity Stones Acquirer Loki|Tony Stark/Iron Man]] † - Victim *[[Time Variance Authority]] *[[Alioth]] - Attempted Killer *[[Kid Loki's Crew]] - Alternate Selves and Former Allies **[[Kid Loki]] - Former Leader **[[Classic Loki]] † **[[Alligator Loki]] **[[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] *[[Loki Bandits]] - Alternate Selves and Temporary Allies **[[President Loki]] **[[Mustache Loki]] **[[Glamshades Loki]] **[[Bicycle Loki]] **[[Pokey Loki]] **[[Military Loki]] **[[Warrior Loki]] **[[Ninja Loki]] **[[Assassin Loki]] **[[Goth Loki]] ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Angel Manuel]] was a stunt double for [[DeObia Oparei]] in the role of Boastful Loki. *DeObia Oparei suggested that the Nexus event story of Boastful Loki could have some truth.[https://thedirect.com/article/loki-captain-america-iron-man-exclusive 'Boastful' Loki Actor Speaks the Truth About Captain America & Iron Man Line (Exclusive)] ==References== {{Gallery|Boastful Loki/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Loki|Loki}} *{{WP|Loki (Marvel Comics)|Loki}} [[ru:Хвастливый Локи]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Loki (TV series) Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Frost Giants]] [[Category:Genderfluid Characters]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Bald Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Royalty]] [[Category:Gods]] [[Category:Asgardian Royal Family Members]] [[Category:Kid Loki's Crew Members]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]] [[Category:LGBTQIA+ Characters]] [[Category:Variants Monitored by the TVA]] [[Category:Pruned]]
